name: Angela Alsobrooks
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,509,536 for Angela Alsobrooks in U.S. Senate, MD. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby. Additional primary-source statements and voting records should continue to be incorporated over time.
